generated_test_case:
- Transform each point (x, y) → (u, v) where u = x + y, v = x - y.
- Then Manhattan distance = max(|u1 - u2|, |v1 - v2|) — no, wait:
|x1 - x2| + |y1 - y2| = max( |(x1+y1) - (x2+y2)|, |(x1-y1) - (x2-y2)| )?
Actually:
|x1 - x2| + |y1 - y2| = max(
(x1 + y1) - (x2 + y2),
(x2 + y2) - (x1 + y1),
(x1 - y1) - (x2 - y2),
(x2 - y2) - (x1 - y1)
)
But that’s not right.

- Alice can halve an even number or subtract 1 from any number
- After each move, Bob responds with x where a is divisible by 2^x but not by 2^(x+1)
